view.title: Validate persona scenario #2
view.subtitle: Step blocked: Exploratory validation blocked: The exploratory step is inconclusive due to insufficient evidence regarding the scenario behavior.

blocks.title: Persona Scenario Validate 2 blocked
blocks.message: Step blocked: Exploratory validation blocked: The exploratory step is inconclusive due to insufficient evidence regarding the scenario behavior.

items.label: Error
items.value: Exploratory validation blocked: The exploratory step is inconclusive due to insufficient evidence regarding the scenario behavior.

items.label: Assessment
items.value: The exploratory step aimed to validate the outcome of running consolidated versus per-location reports, but there is no direct evidence provided that confirms the expected result of this scenario. While the linked use case outlines the need for performance comparison across locations, the evidence does not include any specific checks or validations that demonstrate the scenario behavior as either supported or producing a clear failure report. This lack of concrete evidence leads to an inconclusive status regarding the validation of the persona scenario.
